records.m_Talk_ENG: Where am I?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where am I?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where am I?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were devoured by the Tiger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were devoured by the Tiger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were devoured by the Tiger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the Tiger's belly, filled to the brim with Ink.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the Tiger's belly, filled to the brim with Ink.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the Tiger's belly, filled to the brim with Ink.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I'm seeing something that shouldn't exist
8v Am I still dreaming?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I'm seeing something that shouldn't exist
8v Am I still dreaming?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I'm seeing something that shouldn't exist
8v Am I still dreaming?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You might have dreamed forever until your soul melted away and merged with the Ink.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You might have dreamed forever until your soul melted away and merged with the Ink.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You might have dreamed forever until your soul melted away and merged with the Ink.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But since you've woken, I suppose the text I left behind did its job.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But since you've woken, I suppose the text I left behind did its job.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But since you've woken, I suppose the text I left behind did its job.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you truly alive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you truly alive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you truly alive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do I look like a ghost thrall to you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do I look like a ghost thrall to you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do I look like a ghost thrall to you?

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vIf you were one, you'd have gouged out my eyes by now.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vIf you were one, you'd have gouged out my eyes by now.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vIf you were one, you'd have gouged out my eyes by now.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I thought
8v you were dead.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I thought
8v you were dead.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I thought
8v you were dead.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Didn't I tell you? Even if I end up in its belly, so long as I keep my wits
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Didn't I tell you? Even if I end up in its belly, so long as I keep my wits
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Didn't I tell you? Even if I end up in its belly, so long as I keep my wits
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vThat you'd hold out for ten years.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vThat you'd hold out for ten years.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vThat you'd hold out for ten years.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Within the Tiger's belly, your years lived become its nourishment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Within the Tiger's belly, your years lived become its nourishment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Within the Tiger's belly, your years lived become its nourishment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A normal person would've been digested into Ink in days, but it'd take at least ten years to digest the whole of my life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A normal person would've been digested into Ink in days, but it'd take at least ten years to digest the whole of my life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A normal person would've been digested into Ink in days, but it'd take at least ten years to digest the whole of my life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you weren't bluffing after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you weren't bluffing after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you weren't bluffing after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, no matter how long I held out, I wouldn't have awakened if you hadn't come.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, no matter how long I held out, I wouldn't have awakened if you hadn't come.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, no matter how long I held out, I wouldn't have awakened if you hadn't come.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vYou did well.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vYou did well.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vYou did well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. For enduring and believing in me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. For enduring and believing in me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. For enduring and believing in me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then let's be off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then let's be off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then let's be off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you ready to leave your cozy dream behind and face a living hell?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you ready to leave your cozy dream behind and face a living hell?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you ready to leave your cozy dream behind and face a living hell?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sick of dreams.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sick of dreams.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sick of dreams.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you've clawed your way out of my belly, have you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you've clawed your way out of my belly, have you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you've clawed your way out of my belly, have you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The stench of your guts is something else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The stench of your guts is something else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The stench of your guts is something else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you still alive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you still alive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you still alive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even with the long-lived Mangryang Blood in your veins, no one lasts over ten years in there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even with the long-lived Mangryang Blood in your veins, no one lasts over ten years in there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even with the long-lived Mangryang Blood in your veins, no one lasts over ten years in there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, you got so caught up in your grand design, you missed a small detail.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, you got so caught up in your grand design, you missed a small detail.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you got so caught up in your grand design, you missed a small detail.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The moment you tricked Seosaeng and changed reality, the clock started ticking from the beginning again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The moment you tricked Seosaeng and changed reality, the clock started ticking from the beginning again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The moment you tricked Seosaeng and changed reality, the clock started ticking from the beginning again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I gave you the chance to become one with me, in the ideal world you longed for. And yet you chose to defy my dream and awaken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I gave you the chance to become one with me, in the ideal world you longed for. And yet you chose to defy my dream and awaken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I gave you the chance to become one with me, in the ideal world you longed for. And yet you chose to defy my dream and awaken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Foolish creatures.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Foolish creatures.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Foolish creatures.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
That's exactly why
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
That's exactly why
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
That's exactly why
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'd choose a single day lived on our terms over a good, long lifetime in someone else's dream.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'd choose a single day lived on our terms over a good, long lifetime in someone else's dream.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'd choose a single day lived on our terms over a good, long lifetime in someone else's dream.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what do you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what do you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what do you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of the creation born from your bloodline.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of the creation born from your bloodline.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of the creation born from your bloodline.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're saying this child carries my blood?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're saying this child carries my blood?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're saying this child carries my blood?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
How strange
8v Live long enough, and you see it all.

How strange
8v Live long enough, and you see it all.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
How strange
8v Live long enough, and you see it all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In a month, she'll leave the incubation chamber and begin adaptation training.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In a month, she'll leave the incubation chamber and begin adaptation training.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In a month, she'll leave the incubation chamber and begin adaptation training.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If she has your talents, she'll be in live combat soon enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If she has your talents, she'll be in live combat soon enough.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If she has your talents, she'll be in live combat soon enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a swordswoman unafraid of death.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a swordswoman unafraid of death.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a swordswoman unafraid of death.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vI see.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vI see.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vI see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If she can serve the Administration, I'll gladly lend my support again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If she can serve the Administration, I'll gladly lend my support again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If she can serve the Administration, I'll gladly lend my support again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We won't be seeing each other for a while. Any questions before I go?
records.m_Talk_DEU: We won't be seeing each other for a while. Any questions before I go?
records.m_Talk_FRA: We won't be seeing each other for a while. Any questions before I go?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's her name?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's her name?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's her name?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She doesn't have one yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She doesn't have one yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She doesn't have one yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She'll get a code once she's assigned to a unit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She'll get a code once she's assigned to a unit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She'll get a code once she's assigned to a unit.


8vA name wouldn't hurt.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vA name wouldn't hurt.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vA name wouldn't hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't grow too attached, Myeongdal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't grow too attached, Myeongdal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't grow too attached, Myeongdal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Until mass production begins, we don't know what flaws might show up in the prototypes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Until mass production begins, we don't know what flaws might show up in the prototypes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Until mass production begins, we don't know what flaws might show up in the prototypes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Especially since she was modeled after <color=#ffd34c>you</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Especially since she was modeled after <color=#ffd34c>you</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Especially since she was modeled after <color=#ffd34c>you</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
How much
8v does the upper command know about her?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
How much
8v does the upper command know about her?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
How much
8v does the upper command know about her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They weren't informed. I've broken more than a few taboos getting this far.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They weren't informed. I've broken more than a few taboos getting this far.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They weren't informed. I've broken more than a few taboos getting this far.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If word gets out, she'll be scrapped for sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If word gets out, she'll be scrapped for sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If word gets out, she'll be scrapped for sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'll make sure that never happens.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'll make sure that never happens.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'll make sure that never happens.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like you said. We've got one trainee with exceptional sword skills.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like you said. We've got one trainee with exceptional sword skills.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like you said. We've got one trainee with exceptional sword skills.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thought she was a veteran Counter at first, but turns out she's brand new.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thought she was a veteran Counter at first, but turns out she's brand new.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thought she was a veteran Counter at first, but turns out she's brand new.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How long are you planning to just stand there, old man?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How long are you planning to just stand there, old man?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How long are you planning to just stand there, old man?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? You noticed me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? You noticed me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? You noticed me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was planning to quietly observe today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was planning to quietly observe today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was planning to quietly observe today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've seen your type plenty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've seen your type plenty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've seen your type plenty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ones who treat me like goods to be inspected before deployment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ones who treat me like goods to be inspected before deployment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ones who treat me like goods to be inspected before deployment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you've been watching for over ten days and haven't said a word.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you've been watching for over ten days and haven't said a word.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you've been watching for over ten days and haven't said a word.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyone with authority to take you in the Administration wouldn't see you as a mere object.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyone with authority to take you in the Administration wouldn't see you as a mere object.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyone with authority to take you in the Administration wouldn't see you as a mere object.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can vouch for their character.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can vouch for their character.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can vouch for their character.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not interested in their character. I want to know why you're just staring at me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not interested in their character. I want to know why you're just staring at me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not interested in their character. I want to know why you're just staring at me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess it's a new hobby of mine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guess it's a new hobby of mine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess it's a new hobby of mine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if I made you uncomfortable, I won't come again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if I made you uncomfortable, I won't come again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if I made you uncomfortable, I won't come again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was going to warn you to keep your distance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was going to warn you to keep your distance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was going to warn you to keep your distance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My eyes see things that shouldn't be seen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My eyes see things that shouldn't be seen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My eyes see things that shouldn't be seen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you see people's deaths?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you see people's deaths?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you see people's deaths?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
What
8v? How did you know that?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
What
8v? How did you know that?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
What
8v? How did you know that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You see it even without trying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You see it even without trying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You see it even without trying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So this is what the doctor was worried about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So this is what the doctor was worried about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So this is what the doctor was worried about.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Doctor
8v? You mean Dr. Yulia?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Doctor
8v? You mean Dr. Yulia?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Doctor
8v? You mean Dr. Yulia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you? What do you want from me?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you? What do you want from me?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you? What do you want from me?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Answer me! How do you know about my eyes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Answer me! How do you know about my eyes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Answer me! How do you know about my eyes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You must have been through a lot, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You must have been through a lot, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You must have been through a lot, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing someone's end you never asked for isn't exactly delightful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing someone's end you never asked for isn't exactly delightful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing someone's end you never asked for isn't exactly delightful.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
The other comrades I trained with
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
The other comrades I trained with
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
The other comrades I trained with
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG:
The horrible visions burned into my eyes
8v They weren't hallucinations?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
The horrible visions burned into my eyes
8v They weren't hallucinations?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
The horrible visions burned into my eyes
8v They weren't hallucinations?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't tell you to endure it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I won't tell you to endure it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I won't tell you to endure it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just remember that none of what's coming is your fault.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just remember that none of what's coming is your fault.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just remember that none of what's coming is your fault.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not my fault?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not my fault?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not my fault?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What exactly are these strange memories?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What exactly are these strange memories?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What exactly are these strange memories?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Data corruption.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Data corruption.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Data corruption.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're probably fragments from your past before all this happened.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're probably fragments from your past before all this happened.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're probably fragments from your past before all this happened.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
You're
8v a ghost thrall?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
You're
8v a ghost thrall?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
You're
8v a ghost thrall?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why am I talking to you? Where even is this place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why am I talking to you? Where even is this place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why am I talking to you? Where even is this place?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
No official name
8v but you can call it a mental world.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
No official name
8v but you can call it a mental world.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
No official name
8v but you can call it a mental world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a space where remnants of thoughts and emotions devoured by the Tiger linger briefly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a space where remnants of thoughts and emotions devoured by the Tiger linger briefly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a space where remnants of thoughts and emotions devoured by the Tiger linger briefly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that means I'm dead?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that means I'm dead?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that means I'm dead?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Most likely, yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Most likely, yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Most likely, yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the lingering thoughts of us, tangled in this conversation, will eventually fade too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the lingering thoughts of us, tangled in this conversation, will eventually fade too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the lingering thoughts of us, tangled in this conversation, will eventually fade too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You talk like you barely know what's going on either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You talk like you barely know what's going on either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You talk like you barely know what's going on either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not to mention you tried to kill us all not too long ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not to mention you tried to kill us all not too long ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not to mention you tried to kill us all not too long ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not wrong. My soul's being used just as the Tiger intended. I have no control over it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not wrong. My soul's being used just as the Tiger intended. I have no control over it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not wrong. My soul's being used just as the Tiger intended. I have no control over it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All that remains is a shard of emotion clinging to fading memories, just like you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All that remains is a shard of emotion clinging to fading memories, just like you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All that remains is a shard of emotion clinging to fading memories, just like you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did you throw yourself away just to take down the Tiger?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did you throw yourself away just to take down the Tiger?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did you throw yourself away just to take down the Tiger?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander Myeongdal always read fate through fortunes. He saw from the start that he alone wouldn't be enough to win against the Tiger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander Myeongdal always read fate through fortunes. He saw from the start that he alone wouldn't be enough to win against the Tiger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander Myeongdal always read fate through fortunes. He saw from the start that he alone wouldn't be enough to win against the Tiger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you decided to help?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you decided to help?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you decided to help?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone had to stand with him and cut the Tiger down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone had to stand with him and cut the Tiger down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone had to stand with him and cut the Tiger down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And when I made that choice, I didn't really think about what would come next.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And when I made that choice, I didn't really think about what would come next.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And when I made that choice, I didn't really think about what would come next.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
But in the end, I lost. I was defeated and turned into a pawn of the Tiger
8v I was a fool.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
But in the end, I lost. I was defeated and turned into a pawn of the Tiger
8v I was a fool.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
But in the end, I lost. I was defeated and turned into a pawn of the Tiger
8v I was a fool.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even when Seosaeng offered to fight with you, you pushed him away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even when Seosaeng offered to fight with you, you pushed him away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even when Seosaeng offered to fight with you, you pushed him away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you ever wonder how things would've ended differently if you hadn't been so stubborn?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you ever wonder how things would've ended differently if you hadn't been so stubborn?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you ever wonder how things would've ended differently if you hadn't been so stubborn?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's too late for regrets now, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's too late for regrets now, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's too late for regrets now, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Too late?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Too late?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Too late?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seosaeng tried to help you over and over again. He used up all his money. Faced C.O.s again and again. He put his life on the line just to see you one more time!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seosaeng tried to help you over and over again. He used up all his money. Faced C.O.s again and again. He put his life on the line just to see you one more time!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seosaeng tried to help you over and over again. He used up all his money. Faced C.O.s again and again. He put his life on the line just to see you one more time!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's fate. No matter how hard you try or how far you turn back time, some things will never change.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's fate. No matter how hard you try or how far you turn back time, some things will never change.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's fate. No matter how hard you try or how far you turn back time, some things will never change.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I also
8v wanted to be with Seosaeng.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I also
8v wanted to be with Seosaeng.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I also
8v wanted to be with Seosaeng.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

records.m_Talk_ENG: If there's a reason, then just spit it out. Right now.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Your fate is to die at the happiest moment of your life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And with you, all the people you love most too.


8vYes.


8vYes.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vYes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is the curse carried in the Dragon Blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

But to fight the Beast, that bloodline must continue
8v That's why I told no one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the Administrator, who claims mastery over all, could only watch and guess as fate repeated over a long time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even the Administrator, who claims mastery over all, could only watch and guess as fate repeated over a long time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the Administrator, who claims mastery over all, could only watch and guess as fate repeated over a long time.

8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
So then
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
So then
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: That means I can never be happy with him, by fate. Not ever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That means I can never be happy with him, by fate. Not ever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That means I can never be happy with him, by fate. Not ever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Death is like eternal forgetting. You'll forget even that, in time.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Death is like eternal forgetting. You'll forget even that, in time.

Unless someone breaks the Dragon Blood's curse

8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Well, I'd like to say yes
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: But at least from where I stand, I've never seen a future where that happens.

records.m_Talk_FRA: But at least from where I stand, I've never seen a future where that happens.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where am I?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where am I?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where am I?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were devoured by the Tiger.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were devoured by the Tiger.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were devoured by the Tiger.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is the Tiger's belly, filled to the brim with Ink.

root.m_Talk_FRA: This is the Tiger's belly, filled to the brim with Ink.

8v Am I still dreaming?

I'm seeing something that shouldn't exist
8v Am I still dreaming?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I'm seeing something that shouldn't exist
8v Am I still dreaming?

root.m_Talk_FRA: You might have dreamed forever until your soul melted away and merged with the Ink.

root.m_Talk_FRA: But since you've woken, I suppose the text I left behind did its job.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you truly alive?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do I look like a ghost thrall to you?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Do I look like a ghost thrall to you?

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8vIf you were one, you'd have gouged out my eyes by now.


8vIf you were one, you'd have gouged out my eyes by now.
root.m_Talk_FRA:


I thought
8v you were dead.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I thought
8v you were dead.

Didn't I tell you? Even if I end up in its belly, so long as I keep my wits
8v

Didn't I tell you? Even if I end up in its belly, so long as I keep my wits
8v




8vThat you'd hold out for ten years.
root.m_Talk_FRA:

8vThat you'd hold out for ten years.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Within the Tiger's belly, your years lived become its nourishment.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Within the Tiger's belly, your years lived become its nourishment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A normal person would've been digested into Ink in days, but it'd take at least ten years to digest the whole of my life.

root.m_Talk_FRA: A normal person would've been digested into Ink in days, but it'd take at least ten years to digest the whole of my life.

root.m_Talk_FRA: So you weren't bluffing after all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, no matter how long I held out, I wouldn't have awakened if you hadn't come.







root.m_Talk_FRA: Then let's be off.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sick of dreams.

root.m_Talk_FRA: So you've clawed your way out of my belly, have you?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you still alive?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, you got so caught up in your grand design, you missed a small detail.

8v but you can call it a mental world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a space where remnants of thoughts and emotions devoured by the Tiger linger briefly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a space where remnants of thoughts and emotions devoured by the Tiger linger briefly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a space where remnants of thoughts and emotions devoured by the Tiger linger briefly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that means I'm dead?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that means I'm dead?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that means I'm dead?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Most likely, yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Most likely, yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Most likely, yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the lingering thoughts of us, tangled in this conversation, will eventually fade too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the lingering thoughts of us, tangled in this conversation, will eventually fade too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the lingering thoughts of us, tangled in this conversation, will eventually fade too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You talk like you barely know what's going on either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You talk like you barely know what's going on either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You talk like you barely know what's going on either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not to mention you tried to kill us all not too long ago.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not to mention you tried to kill us all not too long ago.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not to mention you tried to kill us all not too long ago.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're not wrong. My soul's being used just as the Tiger intended. I have no control over it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're not wrong. My soul's being used just as the Tiger intended. I have no control over it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're not wrong. My soul's being used just as the Tiger intended. I have no control over it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All that remains is a shard of emotion clinging to fading memories, just like you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All that remains is a shard of emotion clinging to fading memories, just like you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All that remains is a shard of emotion clinging to fading memories, just like you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why did you throw yourself away just to take down the Tiger?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why did you throw yourself away just to take down the Tiger?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why did you throw yourself away just to take down the Tiger?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Commander Myeongdal always read fate through fortunes. He saw from the start that he alone wouldn't be enough to win against the Tiger.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Commander Myeongdal always read fate through fortunes. He saw from the start that he alone wouldn't be enough to win against the Tiger.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Commander Myeongdal always read fate through fortunes. He saw from the start that he alone wouldn't be enough to win against the Tiger.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you decided to help?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you decided to help?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you decided to help?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Someone had to stand with him and cut the Tiger down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Someone had to stand with him and cut the Tiger down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Someone had to stand with him and cut the Tiger down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And when I made that choice, I didn't really think about what would come next.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And when I made that choice, I didn't really think about what would come next.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And when I made that choice, I didn't really think about what would come next.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
But in the end, I lost. I was defeated and turned into a pawn of the Tiger
8v I was a fool.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
But in the end, I lost. I was defeated and turned into a pawn of the Tiger
8v I was a fool.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
But in the end, I lost. I was defeated and turned into a pawn of the Tiger
8v I was a fool.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even when Seosaeng offered to fight with you, you pushed him away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even when Seosaeng offered to fight with you, you pushed him away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even when Seosaeng offered to fight with you, you pushed him away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you ever wonder how things would've ended differently if you hadn't been so stubborn?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you ever wonder how things would've ended differently if you hadn't been so stubborn?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you ever wonder how things would've ended differently if you hadn't been so stubborn?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's too late for regrets now, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's too late for regrets now, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's too late for regrets now, isn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Too late?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Too late?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Too late?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seosaeng tried to help you over and over again. He used up all his money. Faced C.O.s again and again. He put his life on the line just to see you one more time!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seosaeng tried to help you over and over again. He used up all his money. Faced C.O.s again and again. He put his life on the line just to see you one more time!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seosaeng tried to help you over and over again. He used up all his money. Faced C.O.s again and again. He put his life on the line just to see you one more time!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's fate. No matter how hard you try or how far you turn back time, some things will never change.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's fate. No matter how hard you try or how far you turn back time, some things will never change.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's fate. No matter how hard you try or how far you turn back time, some things will never change.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I also
8v wanted to be with Seosaeng.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I also
8v wanted to be with Seosaeng.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I also
8v wanted to be with Seosaeng.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
If I had been with him when I died
8v maybe I wouldn't have had a grudge.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
If I had been with him when I died
8v maybe I wouldn't have had a grudge.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
If I had been with him when I died
8v maybe I wouldn't have had a grudge.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still keeping secrets, even after death?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still keeping secrets, even after death?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still keeping secrets, even after death?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If there's a reason, then just spit it out. Right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If there's a reason, then just spit it out. Right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If there's a reason, then just spit it out. Right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
What
8v made you this way?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
What
8v made you this way?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
What
8v made you this way?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your fate is to die at the happiest moment of your life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your fate is to die at the happiest moment of your life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your fate is to die at the happiest moment of your life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And with you, all the people you love most too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And with you, all the people you love most too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And with you, all the people you love most too.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
That means
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
That means
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
That means
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what I do, there's no escaping fate?
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what I do, there's no escaping fate?
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what I do, there's no escaping fate?

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8vYes.
root.m_Talk_DEU:

8vYes.
root.m_Talk_FRA:

8vYes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is the curse carried in the Dragon Blood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is the curse carried in the Dragon Blood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is the curse carried in the Dragon Blood.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
But to fight the Beast, that bloodline must continue
8v That's why I told no one.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
But to fight the Beast, that bloodline must continue
8v That's why I told no one.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
But to fight the Beast, that bloodline must continue
8v That's why I told no one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even the Administrator, who claims mastery over all, could only watch and guess as fate repeated over a long time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even the Administrator, who claims mastery over all, could only watch and guess as fate repeated over a long time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even the Administrator, who claims mastery over all, could only watch and guess as fate repeated over a long time.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
So then
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
So then
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
So then
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: That means I can never be happy with him, by fate. Not ever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That means I can never be happy with him, by fate. Not ever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That means I can never be happy with him, by fate. Not ever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Death is like eternal forgetting. You'll forget even that, in time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Death is like eternal forgetting. You'll forget even that, in time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Death is like eternal forgetting. You'll forget even that, in time.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Unless someone breaks the Dragon Blood's curse
8v and ends this fate once and for all.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Unless someone breaks the Dragon Blood's curse
8v and ends this fate once and for all.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Unless someone breaks the Dragon Blood's curse
8v and ends this fate once and for all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think that day will ever come?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think that day will ever come?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think that day will ever come?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Well, I'd like to say yes
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Well, I'd like to say yes
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Well, I'd like to say yes
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: But at least from where I stand, I've never seen a future where that happens.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But at least from where I stand, I've never seen a future where that happens.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But at least from where I stand, I've never seen a future where that happens.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then let's go, Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then let's go, Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then let's go, Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
To go beyond fate means stepping into a future even fortunes can
8kt predict.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
To go beyond fate means stepping into a future even fortunes can
8kt predict.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
To go beyond fate means stepping into a future even fortunes can
8kt predict.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe this is our chance to end that fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe this is our chance to end that fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe this is our chance to end that fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Very well
8v Let's go.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Very well
8v Let's go.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Very well
